exemplar.title:
How does Graham Greene use the setting of post-war Vienna to
reinforce the atmosphere of uncertainty of the characters and the
plot in his crime fiction The Third Man?

detailedExemplarData.title:
How does Graham Greene use the setting of post-war Vienna to
reinforce the atmosphere of uncertainty of the characters and the
plot in his crime fiction The Third Man?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Sound understanding of post-war context and its thematic implications
Relevant and generally well-embedded quotations supporting key arguments
Effective analysis of imagery (e.g., âsmashed dreary city of Viennaâ) to illustrate ruin and uncertainty
weaknesses: Commentary occasionally remains too general rather than exploring nuanced interpretation
Some background assertions drift away from direct thematic linkage
Inconsistent bibliography formatting and missing page references weaken documentation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work consistently demonstrates satisfactory knowledge and interpretation of the text and context (band 3). Quotations are generally relevant and support the candidateâs ideas, though analysis sometimes lacks the persuasive nuance required for higher bands. Minor documentation inconsistencies limit the overall polish but do not undermine the core understanding.

strengths: Appropriate analysis of key textual features (symbolism of sewers, use of shadows)
Evaluation of narrative perspective and its impact on uncertainty
Some insightful comments on authorial choices (e.g., personification of nature)
weaknesses: Analysis often lapses into description without fully probing techniqueâeffect links
Insights are intermittent rather than sustained throughout the essay
Discussion of certain scenes (Ferris-wheel, multilingual dialogue) remains surface-level
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay offers generally appropriate analysis and evaluation of textual features (band 3). While there are moments of insight, much of the discussion is descriptive rather than deeply analytical, preventing consistent elevation to higher bands. Strengths in symbolism and narrative perspective are offset by uneven depth of evaluation.

strengths: Clear research question and logical overall structure (introduction, themed body, conclusion)
Thematic paragraphs align with the investigation into setting and uncertainty
weaknesses: Transitions between ideas and paragraphs are often abrupt, hindering cohesion
Thesis statement and conclusion drift into generalities rather than tightly synthesizing arguments
Paragraph development is uneven, with some sections under-developed
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Organization is apparent, but development of the line of inquiry is uneven (band 2). The clear structure provides a foundation, yet frequent abrupt shifts, general thesis framing, and an unfocused conclusion limit the essayâs overall coherence and depth of development.

strengths: Meaning is generally accessible with varied literary vocabulary
Academic register is mostly maintained, and literary terminology is used appropriately
weaknesses: Awkward constructions and occasional run-on sentences reduce clarity
Frequent grammatical and agreement errors interrupt flow
Stylistic inconsistencies and informal touches detract from overall precision
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Language is clear at times but marred by persistent accuracy lapses (band 2). While the register is mostly appropriate, recurring awkward phrasing and grammatical slips prevent the high degree of accuracy and precision required for higher bands.

strandSelections.reasoning: Short quotations are embedded within commentary, for example in the discussion of nature personification and Ferris-wheel dialogue.  Yet at other times quotations are listed outside syntactic flow or presented without analytical integration.  This intermittent execution aligns with band 3 where supporting examples are âsometimes integratedâ into sentences and paragraphs.

The student demonstrates a sound grasp of the novellaâs post-war context, partitioned zones and key locales such as the sewers and Ferris wheel. Remarks about duality, divided loyalties and the impact of destruction on characters show more than basic recall.  However, much commentary remains general (âadds mystery,â âallows the reader to understandâ) and sometimes drifts into background assertions about Vienna rather than tightly linking historical facts to thematic implications.  Interpretations are sustained but not yet persuasive or nuanced enough for the top bands, so a satisfactoryâgood level (band 3) is most fitting.

There is a clear line of inquiryâhow setting reinforces uncertaintyâand the essay follows a logical progression (introduction, themed body sections, conclusion).  However, transitions are occasionally abrupt, paragraphing uneven, and ideas sometimes repeat, limiting overall cohesion.  Development of points is adequate but not consistently thorough, so the work meets the descriptors for band 3: âadequately organized with some development of line of inquiry.â

Quotations such as âsmashed dreary city of Vienna,â the Ferris-wheel dialogue and Callowayâs judgement of Lime are relevant and generally support claims.  They are embedded within sentences but not always analysed in depth; occasionally only phrases are listed (âExorbitant in its pricesâ) without commentary.  References appear regularly enough to back the main argument yet the selection is not consistently strategic or wide-ranging, aligning with band 3 where evidence is âgenerally relevant and mostly supportâ the ideas.

The student adopts an academic register, using third-person voice, literary terminology and appropriate citation.  Minor informal touches (âWithout any doubtâ) do not severely disrupt tone, but stylistic consistency is imperfect.  Hence, register and style are âmostly appropriate,â matching band 3.

Language is generally clear and meaning accessible; vocabulary is varied (âdualities,â âubiquitous mysteryâ).  Still, frequent awkward constructions (âwhich allows to add symbolismâ), agreement slips and occasional run-on sentences reduce accuracy.  Overall clarity with several lapses corresponds to band 3.

The essay moves beyond narration by commenting on symbolism of the sewers, use of shadows and the limited narrator.  These points constitute appropriate textual analysis and some evaluation of authorial choices.  Nonetheless, discussion frequently lapses into description (âthis creates a sense of mysteryâ) without probing techniqueâeffect links, and insights remain intermittent rather than sustained.  This places the work solidly in band 3 for âgenerally appropriate analysis and evaluation.â

annotations.comment: The claim about a multilingual atmosphere lacks concrete examples of dialogueâinserting a sample exchange would substantiate this point.
The research question is clearly stated and focused, providing a strong foundation for the investigation into setting and uncertainty.
The opening paragraph is overly broad and general; consider refining the thesis to tie directly into the novelâs themes rather than summarizing authorial choices.
Develop the sewer imagery analysis by explaining how the damp darkness shapes the readerâs emotional response to Limeâs guilt.
The first sentence remains generic and descriptive. A sharper, more analytical hook linked to uncertainty could strengthen the argument from the outset.
The phrase âallows to add symbolismâ is awkward. Rephrase for clarity, for example: âenables Greene to imbue the setting with symbolic meaning.â
Effective use of the repeated quotation âsmashed dreary city of Viennaâ highlights how Greeneâs imagery conveys ruin and lingering dread.
Rather than simply noting repetition, analyse how the triple use of âsmashedâ intensifies the readerâs sense of desolation and moral decay.
The phrasing âboth, residents like Baron Kurtz or Kochâ is confusingâclarify the subject list and remove the extraneous comma.
The bibliography entry formats vary (e.g., title case vs. uppercase). Select a single style and apply it consistently.
The sewer metaphor is described well but remains at a surface level; link this imagery explicitly to how it reinforces the charactersâ psychological uncertainty.
The quote âIt was as if even nature were doing its best to reject Limeâ requires a page reference for consistency in documentation.
The sentence on personification ends abruptly; complete the thought to ensure coherence and clarity.
Specify how personifying nature as rejecting Lime foreshadows his moral unraveling to deepen your analytical insight.
The visual imagery analysis of shadows and moonlight is effective, illustrating how Greene crafts a classic noir atmosphere.
Tie the discussion of police inefficiency back to how it amplifies the sense of unpredictability and fragmented authority.
The Ferris-wheel quotation is well chosen to illustrate Limeâs philosophical detachment and the thematic climax.
Finish the discussion of how Greeneâs first-person perspective heightens the novelâs pervasive uncertainty.
Refine the conclusion to synthesize how setting, imagery, and narrative perspective collectively reinforce the novelâs uncertainty.
Link the discussion of foreshadowing to its impact on pacing and suspense to strengthen the techniqueâeffect connection.
The contrast between luxury and ruin is noted descriptively; interrogate how this duality mirrors charactersâ divided loyalties.
Could you include a specific instance of multilingual dialogue to demonstrate how Greeneâs use of language diversity intensifies ambiguity?
Your analysis of international police tensions effectively links political division to narrative uncertainty.
This analysis of the Ferris-wheel scene is descriptive; explore the significance of vertical movement as a metaphor for moral elevation or descent.
The phrase âThis literary deviceâ begins a sentence but leaves the explanation unfinishedâcomplete the thought for clarity.
The concluding observation generalizes to other texts and drifts away from The Third Man; maintain focus on the specific novel.
The entry for Evans lacks commas between author, title, and publication details. Ensure uniform punctuation in all bibliography entries.
Consider adopting a formal referencing style (e.g., MLA or APA) and formatting each entry to match that standard throughout.
The access dates in bibliography entries are formatted differently (e.g., 29.12.2024 vs. 01.01.2025). Standardize date presentation.
